name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial assistance of Rs 6000 per year to small and marginal farmers in three installments of Rs 2000 each.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with landholding up to 2 hectares

name: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Housing for all urban poor. Provides subsidy on home loans for EWS, LIG and MIG categories.
eligibility: Urban poor without pucca house

name: PM Awas Yojana (Rural)
description: Financial assistance to rural households for construction of pucca houses.
eligibility: Houseless rural families or those living in kutcha houses

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Health cover of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
eligibility: Below poverty line families as per SECC data

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship for SC students studying at post matriculation level to help them complete education.
eligibility: SC category students with family income below 2.5 lakh

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Provides loans up to Rs 10 lakh to non-corporate small business owners under Shishu, Kishor and Tarun categories.
eligibility: Small business owners, entrepreneurs, self employed individuals

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for girl child with high interest rate and tax benefits under Section 80C.
eligibility: Girl child below 10 years, account opened by parents or guardian

name: National OBC Scholarship
description: Scholarship for OBC students for post matric studies to promote higher education.
eligibility: OBC students with family income below 1 lakh per annum

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganised sector workers with guaranteed pension of Rs 1000 to 5000 per month.
eligibility: Indian citizens between 18 to 40 years with savings bank account

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connections to women from below poverty line households to replace unclean cooking fuels.
eligibility: Women from BPL households without existing LPG connection

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Scheme to address declining child sex ratio and promote welfare of girl child through education.
eligibility: Girl child from birth, focus on districts with low sex ratio

name: National Scholarship Portal - Central Sector Scheme
description: Merit based scholarship for students who passed class 12 with distinction for college studies.
eligibility: Students in top 20 percentile of class 12 board exam with family income below 4.5 lakh

name: PM Scholarship Scheme for Central Armed Police Forces
description: Scholarship for wards of CAPF and Assam Rifles personnel for professional degree courses.
eligibility: Wards of CAPF personnel studying in first year of professional degree

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Credit card for farmers to meet agricultural expenses including crop cultivation and post harvest needs.
eligibility: Farmers, sharecroppers, oral lessees and tenant farmers

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health cards to farmers with crop wise nutrient and fertilizer recommendations.
eligibility: All farmers across India

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities.
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers growing notified crops

name: Mahatma Gandhi NREGA
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.
eligibility: Rural households willing to do unskilled manual work

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Skill development scheme to enable youth to take up industry relevant skill training and get certified.
eligibility: Indian youth who are school or college dropouts or unemployed

name: Stand Up India
description: Bank loans between Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for SC, ST and women entrepreneurs for greenfield enterprises.
eligibility: SC, ST or women entrepreneurs above 18 years for first time business

name: Startup India Seed Fund
description: Financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development and market entry.
eligibility: DPIIT recognized startups less than 2 years old

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Safe motherhood intervention promoting institutional delivery among poor pregnant women.
eligibility: Pregnant women from BPL families for institutional delivery

name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana
description: Health insurance cover of Rs 30000 per family per year for BPL families.
eligibility: BPL families in unorganised sector

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental death and disability insurance cover of Rs 2 lakh at premium of Rs 12 per year.
eligibility: Bank account holders between 18 to 70 years

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance cover of Rs 2 lakh at premium of Rs 330 per year for death due to any reason.
eligibility: Bank account holders between 18 to 50 years

name: National Food Security Act - PDS
description: Subsidised food grains at Rs 1-3 per kg to eligible households through Public Distribution System.
eligibility: Households covered under Antyodaya Anna Yojana and Priority Households

name: Mid Day Meal Scheme
description: Free cooked meal to children in government and government aided schools to improve enrollment and nutrition.
eligibility: Children studying in Class 1 to 8 in government schools

name: Sarva Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Universal elementary education programme for children aged 6 to 14 years with focus on girls and SC/ST.
eligibility: All children between 6 to 14 years especially girls and SC/ST

name: Integrated Child Development Services
description: Nutrition, health and education services for children under 6 and pregnant or lactating mothers.
eligibility: Children below 6 years and pregnant or lactating mothers

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission
description: Promotes self employment and organisation of rural poor through self help groups and skill training.
eligibility: Rural poor households especially women

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement linked skill training for rural youth from poor families with focus on regular employment.
eligibility: Rural youth from poor families between 15 to 35 years

name: SC/ST Post Matric Scholarship West Bengal
description: State scholarship for SC and ST students studying in post matric courses in West Bengal.
eligibility: SC/ST students domiciled in West Bengal with family income below 2 lakh

name: Kanyashree Prakalpa
description: West Bengal scheme providing annual scholarship and one time grant to girls to prevent child marriage.
eligibility: Unmarried girls between 13 to 18 years studying in school in West Bengal

name: Swasthya Sathi West Bengal
description: West Bengal health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment up to Rs 5 lakh per family per year.
eligibility: All families in West Bengal especially from economically weaker sections

name: Sabuj Sathi West Bengal
description: West Bengal scheme providing free bicycles to students of class 9 to 12 in government schools.
eligibility: Students of class 9 to 12 in government and government aided schools in West Bengal

name: Yuvashree West Bengal
description: Unemployment allowance of Rs 1500 per month to educated unemployed youth in West Bengal.
eligibility: Unemployed youth between 18 to 45 years registered with employment exchange in West Bengal

name: Aikyashree West Bengal
description: West Bengal scholarship for minority community students from pre matric to post matric level.
eligibility: Minority community students in West Bengal with family income below 2 lakh

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Micro credit scheme for street vendors to avail working capital loans of Rs 10000 to Rs 50000.
eligibility: Street vendors who were vending before March 2020

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Free food grains of 5 kg per person per month to beneficiaries under National Food Security Act.
eligibility: NFSA beneficiaries including Antyodaya Anna Yojana and Priority Household cardholders

name: National Means cum Merit Scholarship
description: Scholarship of Rs 12000 per year to meritorious students from economically weaker sections from class 9 onwards.
eligibility: Students who passed class 8 with 55 percent marks with family income below 3.5 lakh

name: Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Support to traditional artisans and craftspeople with skill training, credit and market linkage support.
eligibility: Artisans and craftspeople working with hands and tools in 18 traditional trades

name: E Shram Portal Registration
description: Registration of unorganised workers for social security benefits and direct benefit transfers.
eligibility: Unorganised sector workers not covered under EPFO or ESIC

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Zero balance bank accounts with RuPay debit card, overdraft facility and insurance cover.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years without a bank account

name: Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
description: High interest savings scheme for senior citizens with quarterly interest payout and tax benefits.
eligibility: Indian citizens above 60 years or above 55 years if retired

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension
description: Monthly pension of Rs 200 to 500 for destitute elderly persons above 60 years from BPL families.
eligibility: BPL persons above 60 years

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension
description: Monthly pension for persons with severe or multiple disabilities from BPL households.
eligibility: Persons with 80 percent or more disability from BPL families between 18 to 79 years

name: National ST Scholarship
description: Scholarship for ST students for post matric studies to support higher education among tribal students.
eligibility: ST students with family income below 2.5 lakh per annum

name: PM Wani Scheme
description: Public WiFi network scheme to provide affordable broadband internet through local area networks.
eligibility: All Indian citizens especially in rural and semi urban areas

name: Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
description: Digital literacy programme to make 6 crore rural households digitally literate.
eligibility: Rural household members who are not digitally literate

name: Niramaya Health Insurance for Disabled
description: Health insurance of Rs 1 lakh for persons with disabilities including autism and cerebral palsy.
eligibility: Persons with disabilities including autism, cerebral palsy, mental retardation

name: Pradhan Mantri Rojgar Protsahan Yojana
description: Government pays EPF and EPS contribution for new employees to incentivize employers to create jobs.
eligibility: New employees earning below Rs 15000 per month registered with EPFO
